rationale: Multiple new local users were created via 'net user /add' (A0, EV-002) and 'New-LocalUser' (EV-001) commands, with one user being added to the 'administrators' localgroup (EV-002). Although the accounts were subsequently deleted (EV-003, EV-004, EV-005), the creation of privileged accounts indicates an attempt at persistence or privilege escalation, which is a malicious activity.
